metadata.name: Pong
metadata.description: Fixed-screen arcade proof that SDL3D gameplay rules can be authored through generic entities, sensors, signals, timers, and actions.

adapters.name: adapter.pong.serve_random
adapters.description: Choose a non-extreme random serve vector for the ball.

adapters.name: adapter.pong.reflect_from_paddle
adapters.description: Reflect ball velocity using Pong-specific hit-offset deflection.

adapters.name: adapter.pong.cpu_track_ball
adapters.description: Move the CPU paddle toward the current ball position.

adapters.name: adapter.pong.configure_play_input
adapters.description: Configure Pong paddle bindings for single-player or local multiplayer layouts.

adapters.name: adapter.pong.load_persistence
adapters.description: Load persisted Pong score records from user storage.

adapters.name: adapter.pong.record_player_win
adapters.description: Record a player match win in persistent score data.

adapters.name: adapter.pong.record_cpu_win
adapters.description: Record a CPU match win in persistent score data.
